name: tidycal-pp-mcp
description: Scheduling and booking API for meetings, contacts, booking types, and team calendars.

tidycal_api_token.title: TIDYCAL_API_TOKEN
tidycal_api_token.description: Optional. Sets TIDYCAL_API_TOKEN for the TidyCal MCP server. Get a credential from https://tidycal.com/integrations/oauth.

tidycal_bearer_auth.title: TIDYCAL_BEARER_AUTH
tidycal_bearer_auth.description: Optional. Sets TIDYCAL_BEARER_AUTH for the TidyCal MCP server. Get a credential from https://tidycal.com/integrations/oauth.
